title: CURTAIN – A Unique Web-based tool for exploration and sharing of MS-based proteomics data
author: Kerryn Berndsen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Primary data associated with the manuscript "CURTAIN – A Unique Web-based tool for exploration and sharing of MS-based proteomics data" (Toan K. Phung, Kerryn Berndsen, Tran Le Cong Huyen Bao Phan, Miratul M. K. Muqit, Dario R. Alessi, Raja S. Nirujogi) ( doi: https://doi.org/10.1101/2023.07.25.550405 ) 

 These include: raw immunoblotting data (annotated .tiff exports of Image Studio Lite Licor scans) and their quantitation (.xlsx files) and graphs obtained using GraphPad Prism (.pzf files); PCR and sequencing data (.ab1 and .seq files) confirming that PPM1H-BromoTag clone E5 (used for all experiments in the manuscript) is a homozygous clone.
steps_raw:
Primary data associated with the manuscript "CURTAIN – A Unique Web-based tool for exploration and sharing of MS-based proteomics data" (Toan K. Phung, Kerryn Berndsen, Tran Le Cong Huyen Bao Phan, Miratul M. K. Muqit, Dario R. Alessi, Raja S. Nirujogi) ( doi: https://doi.org/10.1101/2023.07.25.550405 ) 

 These include: raw immunoblotting data (annotated .tiff exports of Image Studio Lite Licor scans) and their quantitation (.xlsx files) and graphs obtained using GraphPad Prism (.pzf files); PCR and sequencing data (.ab1 and .seq files) confirming that PPM1H-BromoTag clone E5 (used for all experiments in the manuscript) is a homozygous clone.
